title: Workspaces
intro: Shared spaces for habits you keep together — with a partner, family, or small group.
settingsLinkHint: Shared spaces with a partner or small group.
signInRequiredBody: Workspaces sync between people, so they need a real account — Google or email/password. Guest accounts can't sync.

empty.title: No workspaces yet
empty.body: Create one to track habits alongside a partner or small group, or paste an invite code to join one.

modePairBody: Two people — buddy, spouse, accountability partner.
modeGroupBody: Up to 10 people — family, study circle, team.

new.title: New workspace
new.iconHint: Pick one — used in the list + the home-screen badge.

join.title: Join workspace
join.subtitle: Enter the invite code your friend shared.

errors.invalid-code: That code isn't valid. Double-check the letters and digits.
errors.workspace-missing: Workspace not found — it may have been deleted.
errors.already-member: You're already a member of this workspace.
errors.workspace-full: This workspace is full ({max} members max).
errors.signed-out: Sign in first, then try the invite link again.
errors.firebase-disabled: Workspaces need Firebase to be configured.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

detail.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, or you're no longer a member.

invite.title: Invite
invite.body: Anyone with this link can join, up to {max} members.
invite.rotateConfirm: Generate a new code? The old link stops working immediately.

leave.title: Leave workspace
leave.body: You'll stop seeing the shared habits. Your own logs stay on your device.
leave.confirm: Leave this workspace? You can rejoin later if someone shares the code.
leave.ownerCant: Owners can't leave — delete the workspace instead, or hand over ownership (coming later).

delete.title: Delete workspace
delete.body: Removes the workspace for everyone. This can't be undone.
delete.confirm: Delete this workspace for everyone? This can't be undone.

home.noHabitsYet: No shared habits in this workspace yet.

habits.title: Shared habits
habits.bodyOwner: Add habits everyone in this workspace tracks together. Each member logs their own completions; the list is shared.
habits.bodyMember: Habits everyone here tracks together. The owner edits the list; you log your own completions.
habits.emptyOwner: No shared habits yet — add the first one.
habits.emptyMember: The owner hasn't added any shared habits yet.
habits.deleteConfirm: Remove this shared habit? Every member loses it from their checklist.
